---
title: R Introduction Course Winter 2025
author: Jürgen Wilbert
date: '2026-02-21'
categories:
  - teaching
  - presentation
  - R
abstract: 'Slides and exercises from the R Introduction Course I gave in winter 2026.'
---

Here are slides and exercises from the R Introduction Course I gave in winter 2026.

<https://jazznbass.github.io/course_dataanalyzes_with_r/>

![](images/clipboard-3197592723.png)
